classificationDefinitions.acceptable_duplicate: Known duplicate pattern that does not currently imply SEO authority drift.
classificationDefinitions.watchlist: Visible duplicate signal that should be monitored before content expansion.
classificationDefinitions.migration_required: Must be migrated or reconciled before affected page families expand.
classificationDefinitions.CMS_remediation_required: Should be fixed through backend/CMS metadata or entity ownership, not frontend title changes.
classificationDefinitions.semantic_entity_risk: Possible duplicate entity family requiring canonical ownership decisions.
